hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in *.py) uv run ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); if [ "$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("stop_hook_active", False))')" = "True" ]; then exit 0; fi; uv run pytest tests/ backend/tests/ --cov=src -q 2>&1 | tail -20; exit 0
